summary: Router refactoring regression tests completed. 24/25 tests passed (96%). All 8 thin-wrapper routers (auth, documents, workflows, mailbox, aliases, file_import, bc, spiro) correctly delegate to server.py handlers. One pre-existing bug found in /api/workflows/ap_invoice/metrics endpoint (not a regression).

minor.note: PRE-EXISTING BUG - not caused by refactoring. Data in aggregation results sometimes missing 'to_status' field
EXPECTED - known pre-existing BC tenant credentials issue documented in task

critical_code_review_comments: Thin-wrapper router pattern correctly implemented - routers use router.add_api_route() to delegate to server.py handlers
All 8 new routers loaded before legacy_api_router in main.py so they take precedence
Router prefixes correctly match original API paths (e.g., /auth, /documents, /workflows, /settings, /aliases, /sales/file-import, /bc, /spiro)
The /api/workflows/ap_invoice/metrics bug exists in server.py line 8969 - should handle missing 'to_status' in aggregation results
seed_data_creation: None - used existing documents in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Router refactoring verified. All thin-wrapper routers work correctly. Two known issues exist: (1) /api/workflows/ap_invoice/metrics has a pre-existing KeyError bug in server.py aggregation pipeline, (2) /api/bc/companies fails due to BC tenant credentials issue (documented as expected).

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live, no mocking
